name: medication-management-block
title: Medication Management
description: Active medications with interactions and adherence, today's dose checklist, per-drug dosing schedule, and related appointments. DashboardShell + DashboardGrid.
clinicalNotes: Brings the whole medication picture into one view: the reconciled list (with interaction warnings first and an adherence ring), plus the operational 'what's due now' via the dose checklist and per-drug timing strips. This pairing is the point — a list tells you what is prescribed, the checklist/strips tell you what was actually taken, and the gap between them is where adherence problems and double-dosing hide. Keep dose toggles wired to your source of truth.
notes: Layer-M3 block (B-5). Client component. Composes 2 M2 panels + dose-checklist + medication-timing-strip.
